case.title: MILLER BREWING CO. v. JONES, DIR., REV. OF ILLINOIS.

opinion.h1: MILLER BREWING CO. v. JONES, DIR., REV. OF ILLINOIS., 386 U.S. 684 (1967)
opinion.h4: 386 U.S. 684"> MILLER BREWING CO. v. JONES, DIRECTOR OF REVENUE OF ILLINOIS. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 1067. Decided April 17, 1967.
opinion.p: Frank H. Uriell and Paul A. Teschner for appellant.
William G. Clark, Attorney General of Illinois, and Richard A. Michael and John J. O'Toole, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
